description: Using Sugar's Terminal activity, develop a Morse code translation system in /home/ga/Documents/morse/. Create a reference file named morse_reference.txt containing mappings for all 26 letters (A-Z) and 10 digits (0-9) in the format LETTER MORSE_CODE (one per line). Implement an encoder script encode.sh that converts a plaintext string to Morse code (letters separated by spaces, words separated by ' / ') and a decoder script decode.sh that converts Morse code back to uppercase English text. Use the system to perform the following: encode "SUGAR LABS" and save the result to /home/ga/Documents/morse/encoded_output.txt; decode "... --- ..." and save the result to /home/ga/Documents/morse/decoded_output.txt; and perform a roundtrip test by encoding "HELLO WORLD" then decoding the result, saving the final output to /home/ga/Documents/morse/roundtrip_output.txt.
